description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Checks that runs on every push to the master branch. Use a matrix job that runs on macos-latest, ubuntu-latest, and windows-latest with Python versions 3.7 and 3.8. For each combination, check out the repository, set up Python, install dependencies including pip, wheel, codecov, coverage, flake8, and pytest, then test with pytest and lint with flake8, and submit code coverage to codecov.
